tasks.subject: Task 0: Dependencies + SAML queries + sqlc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Promote crewjam/saml + goxmldsig to direct deps; add GetSAMLSPByID + DeleteSAMLSessionsBySession queries; regenerate sqlc; build+tests green.

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","db/queries/saml.sql","pkg/db/saml_sp.sql.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./pkg/db/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["crewjam/saml + goxmldsig direct","GetSAMLSPByID + DeleteSAMLSessionsBySession generate","build+db tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Hardened XML/DSig layer (xmlsec.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseXMLSecure (DTD/XXE-off + dup-ID reject), signElement (RSA-SHA256 enveloped, exclusive C14N), verifyElementSignature (against supplied cert, reject SHA-1, reference-ties-to-element anti-XSW).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/xmlsec.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestXMLSec -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["parseXMLSecure rejects DTD/XXE + duplicate IDs","signElement RSA-SHA256 exclusive-C14N enveloped","verifyElementSignature rejects SHA-1 + wrapped sig + wrong cert"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: IdP widening + signing-key reuse (saml.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Widen IdP struct (cfg,queries,kv,sessions,audit,rl,keys) + NewIdP(...); samlKeyCache over ListActiveSigningKeys exposing active RSA key + x509 cert + all non-retired certs; entityID/ssoURL/sloURL/metadataURL helpers.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/saml.go","pkg/protocol/saml/keys_saml.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestIdP -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["IdP deps + NewIdP","signing-key cache active key+cert + all certs","entityID/ssoURL/sloURL helpers from PublicOrigins"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Stable NameID (subjectid.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** (i *IdP) subjectID(ctx, accountID, spID, format) get-or-create stable 32-byte base64url NameID via GetSAMLSubjectID/InsertSAMLSubjectID; replaces skeleton stub.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/subjectid.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestSubjectID -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["get-or-create on ErrNoRows","stable across calls","distinct per SP, 43-char base64url"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Attribute projection (attributes.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** projectAttributes(account, attribute_map JSONB ordered array) -> []samlAttr (multi-valued, NameFormat basic/uri, administrator rule); ghesDefaultAttributeMap (USERNAME/administrator/emails/public_keys uri/gpg_keys).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/attributes.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestAttributes -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["ordered array decode + source resolve (username/attributes.<k>)","multi-valued emit","administrator true on admin","NameFormat URIs exact; absent source omitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: IdP metadata + SP-metadata parse (metadata.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** idpMetadata/HandleMetadata (EntityDescriptor: signing certs, SSO/SLO endpoints both bindings, NameIDFormat persistent-1.1, WantAuthnRequestsSigned); parseSPMetadata (entity_id + ACS + signing certs) for the CLI.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/metadata.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestMetadata -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["IdP metadata: certs + SSO/SLO + NameIDFormat","HandleMetadata content-type","parseSPMetadata extracts entity_id/ACS/certs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: AuthnRequest parse + validate (authnreq.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseAuthnRequest: redirect-binding decode, GetSAMLSPByEntityID, verify SP signature (detached redirect sig over query string OR enveloped POST) against saml_sp_key cert, reject SHA-1, replay (KV single-use ID), Destination + ACS exact-match (open-redirect guard).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestAuthnReq -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["redirect decode + SP lookup","require-signed enforced (ErrMissingSignature)","bad ACS->ErrInvalidACS","replay reject; Destination mismatch reject; unknown SP"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Assertion + Response build/sign (assertion.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** buildResponse: Assertion (Subject NameID + SubjectConfirmationData Recipient=ACS/NotOnOrAfter/InResponseTo; Conditions Audience=entity_id +/-180s; AuthnStatement PasswordProtectedTransport/SessionIndex/SessionNotOnOrAfter; AttributeStatement) signed, wrapped in signed Response. Sign BOTH (RSA-SHA256).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/assertion.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestAssertion -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["sign both Assertion + Response","round-trip: crewjam SP-side ParseResponse accepts it vs our metadata","Recipient/Audience/NameID correct; tamper rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: /saml/sso handler (sso.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HandleSSO: parse+validate -> session gate (no session->login 302; IsPassive->NoPassive; disabled sentinel->no-session) -> rate-limit -> subjectID -> projectAttributes -> buildResponse -> InsertSAMLSession -> audit -> auto-POST form to ACS.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestSSO -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["no session->login 302; IsPassive->NoPassive; disabled-sentinel no-panic","happy: auto-POST SAMLResponse verifies + NameID stable","saml_session inserted + audit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: /saml/slo handler (slo.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HandleSLO: decode+verify LogoutRequest (required sig), validate Destination/NotOnOrAfter + NameID->saml_session, RevokeBySessionID + DeleteSAMLSessionsBySession, signed LogoutResponse, audit logout.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/slo.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestSLO -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["valid LogoutRequest -> session revoked + signed LogoutResponse + audit","bad signature -> reject, session untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: saml-sp CLI (metadata ingestion)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BuildSPParams (metadata-XML ingest + overrides; --kind ghes applies GHES default attribute_map + require_signed_authn_request); saml-sp create (insert sp+acs+keys in tx, print summary) + list.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/clientgen_saml.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... -run TestSPGen -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["metadata ingest populates entity_id/ACS/certs","--kind ghes default attribute_map + signed-authn","manual flags; missing entity_id/ACS -> error; list prints SPs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Server wiring + routes (server.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add samlIdP *saml.IdP to Server; construct saml.NewIdP(config, queries, kvStore, sessionStore, auditWriter, rateLimiter); mount /saml/{metadata,sso(GET+POST),slo(GET+POST)}.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["NewIdP constructed with deps","5 route mounts behind LoadSession","build+vet+tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: cmd/smoke mock-SP
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full SAML flow end-to-end: keygen + /saml/metadata; saml-sp create (ingest mock SP metadata); signed AuthnRequest -> /saml/sso (authed) -> verify POSTed SAMLResponse (sig/Destination/Recipient/Audience/NameID/attrs); 2nd SSO NameID stable; /saml/slo (session revoked); negatives (unsigned/bad-ACS/replay); DB asserts (saml_subject_id stable, saml_session, credential_event factor=saml_sp).

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke-v05-admin -display \"Smoke v0.5 Admin\"","acceptanceCriteria":["full SSO flow + SAMLResponse verified vs metadata","NameID stable across 2 SSOs","SLO revokes session (/me 401)","negatives reject; DB asserts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Docs (STATUS/AUDIT/INTEGRATION)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** STATUS v0.5 section (shipped/endpoints/smoke-covered+untested/notes D1-D9); AUDIT SAML rows smoke-verified + XSW/XXE/replay defenses recorded + deferred list; INTEGRATION SAML IdP section (saml-sp CLI, /saml/metadata, SP-side config).

```json:metadata
{"files":["STATUS.md","AUDIT.md","INTEGRATION.md"],"verifyCommand":"git diff --stat STATUS.md AUDIT.md INTEGRATION.md","acceptanceCriteria":["STATUS v0.5 smoke lists","AUDIT SAML rows smoke-verified + defenses","INTEGRATION SAML operator config"]}
```
